characters.name: "Rapid" Ronnie Racer
characters.description: "Rapid" Ronnie RacerGenderMaleOccupationRum runnerRelativesPa Racer(son)Pops Racer(grandson)Mom Racer(granddaughter-in-law)Rex Racer(great-grandson)Speed Racer(great-grandson)Spritle Racer(great-grandson)Debut appearanceWonderful World of Racing: The Amazing Racer FamilyVoiced byNonePortrayed byUnknown"Rapid" Ronnie Raceris a character mentioned inWonderful World of Racing: The Amazing Racer Family. Ronnie Racer is the father of Pa Racer and grandfather of Pops Racer. He was a rum runner in the 1920s, with Pops describing him as having "picked up from the hills and delivered to the city".

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: AlexGenderFemaleOccupationStudentCars drivenAlex's carDebut appearanceS1E03 -The Beginning: Part 3Voiced by???Alexis a minor recurring character fromSpeed Racer:The Next Generation. Alex (andJen) is an obsessed fangirl ofSpeed Racer Jr.andX Racer. She owns a magazine named "I *heart* X" that she has him sign after he wins theAnnual Parts Race. She spends most of her time sending her friends messages on her phone, even when they're right next to her. She is aRacer Academystudent, and is seen at various points during the series, often with her friend Jen. Alex (andJen) is an obsessed fangirl ofSpeed Racer Jr.andX Racer. She owns a magazine named "I *heart* X" that she has him sign after he wins theAnnual Parts Race. She spends most of her time sending her friends messages on her phone, even when they're right next to her.

characters.name: Arnold Royalton
characters.description: Arnold RoyaltonReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleOccupationCEO ofRoyalton IndustriesGloboCom employee (former)Debut appearanceSpeed Racer (2008 film)Voiced byRoger AllamPortrayed byRoger AllamE.P. Arnold Royalton, Esq.is a character from theSpeed Racerfilm. Portrayed byRoger Allam, he is the founder and head ofRoyalton Industriesand is a fierce competitor of many other companies, one of them beingTogokahn Motors. He is the main antagonist of the film. Arnold Royalton formerly worked at GloboCom before quitting his job there. From that point, with a Commodore 64 computer operated from the basement of his foster parents' house, he started up his own company, Royalton Industries. Over the years, under Royalton's leadership, it grew into a major conglomerate with at least one hundred subsidiaries under its umbrella. The racing division of R.I., Royalton Racecars, is one of the top teams in theWorld Racing League. However, he is also directly involved in the insidious race-fixing scheme that plagued the WRL for decades, profiting off of it, and hiring race-fixers such asCruncher Blockto bribe or force drivers to lose on purpose or be killed if they refuse to comply. Royalton first appears in the film when he arrived at the Racer residence in a K-harrier at breakfast, before he took the Racer family to Royalton Tower to give them a tour there. He then offersSpeed Racera contract to be a racing driver for his company, offering him a luxurious lifestyle. However, Speed later refused, opting to keep the family feel of his team. Royalton then revealed that all WRL-sanctioned races are fixed with the outcome designed to benefit the sponsors. He threatens Speed that he will ensure he will not even finish a single race. Royalton initially appeared friendly and courteous to the Racer family, but when Speed turned down his offer to be a contracted driver for Royalton Industries, he reveals his true colors. He is a corrupt and greedy corporate executive who sees racing as a means to gain wealth and power. He does not care about sportsmanship or ethics, and is willing to use any and all unscrupulous methods to protect his bottom line. He treats the wreck ofCarl Potts' car that he has on display at his office in Royalton Tower as the idol for his arrogant and self-serving faith in the race-fixing scheme, in direct contrast to the sport of racing being Speed's "religion". He is also a hypocrite, falsely claiming in his interview inWonderful World of Racing: The Amazing Racer Familythat his company is independent. When Speed had exposed the GRX's spearhook to the track cameras, his faith in the race-fixing scheme was shattered, more evident when he lost his composure upon Speed winning the Grand Prix, as well as knowing that he would lose everything, including his freedom.

characters.name: Bent Cranium
characters.description: Bent CraniumReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumBent Cranium, known in the original animated series asBen Cranem(Japanese:大原Ōhara,Ohara), is a semi-recurring character in the lore of theSpeed Racerfranchise, best known as an automotive genius who had invented theGRX. Ten years prior to the events of the series, Ben Cranem had developed the GRX racing engine. Five test drivers had crashed attempting to drive it, one of which being Ben Cranem himself. Five years later, Cranem was buried at the Spook Cemetery along with the engine byPops Racer. During the events of the two-part episode, "The Fastest Car on Earth", Ben's son,Curly Cranem, attempts to gain the GRX for himself, believing that only he has the right to it. Eventually, in Part 2, he got to be the GRX's driver for the Oriental Grand Prix, only to die in a horrendous crash after drinking water and developing tachophobia, due to having taken V-Gas prior to the start of the race.

characters.name: Beth Watkins
characters.description: Beth WatkinsGenderFemaleOccupationCan-Am UstudentCars drivenBeth's carDebut appearanceS1E05 -Be Cruel to Your SchoolVoiced by???Beth Watkinsis a minor character fromSpeed Racer:The Next Generation. She is initially quite serious and reserved, only caring about winning the races. However, after the races are over, she opens up more. She is aCan-Am Ustudent who was invited to participate in the 10thAnnual Academy Checkered Flag Challenge, together with her classmateLarry Lee. She is initially quite serious and reserved, only caring about winning the races. However, after the races are over, she opens up more.

characters.name: Billy Ray
characters.description: Billy RayReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleOccupationRacerCars drivenSurge Box(green)Debut appearanceSpeed Racer (2008 film)Voiced byN/APortrayed byTimo Honsa[1][2]Billy Ray, otherwise known as theZokeo Driver[1], is a minor character from theSpeed Racerfilm. He wears orange clothes, helmet, and face paint that goes from his nose all the way up to his forehead; all of it with yellow waveforms drawn over. Billy Ray is a member of theZokeo Communicationsteam. He drives the greenSurge BoxT-180.

characters.name: Blackjack Benelli
characters.description: Blackjack BenelliReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleOccupationRace-fixerDebut appearanceSpeed Racer (2008 film)Blackjack Benelliis a character in theSpeed Racerfilm. During the flashback sequence ofRex Racer's race atThunderheadin theMach 4, it was shown that Benelli was temperamental and intolerant of failure when his race fixing doesn't go according to plan. Blackjack Benelli was a notorious race-fixer. During the flashback sequences at the beginning of the film, it was shown that he tried to have Rex eliminated from the race as part of a fix, but failed because of the latter being too fast. During the flashback sequence ofRex Racer's race atThunderheadin theMach 4, it was shown that Benelli was temperamental and intolerant of failure when his race fixing doesn't go according to plan.

characters.name: Booster Mbube
characters.description: Booster MbubeReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderFemaleOccupationRacerCars drivenSurge BoxDebut appearanceSpeed Racer The VideogameVoiced byDebra Wilson (game)Portrayed byUnknownBooster Mbubeis a character whose name is listed in theGrand Prixracer list from theSpeed Racermovie, being a member of theZokeo Communicationsteam. Although she wouldn't make an on-screen appearance until thevideogame. Booster doesn't appear in the movie. However, herT-180, theSurge Box, appears during the race atFuji, although there is adifferent driveron the wheel. Two Zokeo Communications vehicles are seen during the Grand Prix race. It is possible that Booster drives one of them, but that is unconfirmed.

characters.name: Buck Condor
characters.description: Buck CondorGenderMaleOccupationSports promoterCrime bossDebut appearanceSpeed Racer#1: Born to RaceBuck Condoris the main antagonist of the 1999Speed Racercomic miniseries by WildStorm. He is a sports promoter who owns the Del Mar Speedway and sponsors the Condor 500 racing event held there. Secretly, he is the front man for a large international ring of crime syndicates, which included the likes of the Gang of Assassins, Cumulus, and Cruncher Block. According toInspector Detector, Buck Condor started out as a petty racketeer, fixing sporting events. He soon took advantage of his business prowess to build up a vast financial empire of money laundering and securities fraud.

characters.name: Bumble Bee
characters.description: Bumble BeeReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleOccupationRacerCars drivenNosok CarDebut appearanceSpeed Racer (2008 film)Voiced byN/APortrayed by???Bumble Bee[1]is a minor character from theSpeed Racerfilm. He wears a yellow and black racing suit made to resemble a bumblebee. His helmet has a black visor that covers half of his face, with his nose and mouth being his only shown facial features. He also sports a horseshoe mustache. Aside fromNosokand the number 72, other logos seem on the outfit are: Fudmo Ultra Wash, Glu Mobile, Knutwurst,MediusRez, Perico TV, Wurtz Tooling Support, and an unidentified orange sponsor on the back of his helmet. The driver is the first threat of theFuji Helexiconrace. He's sponsored byNosokand drives the car numbered 72. The driver attempts to get rid ofSpeed Racerright after he leaves the Helexicon loops. However,Racer Xarrives and shunts him into the volcano, destroying his car. The driver was rescued by hisKwik-Savedevice.

characters.name: Captain Terror
characters.description: Captain TerrorGenderMaleOccupationRacerVoiced by(needs research)Captain Terror(アクロバット族の首領,,Akurobatto-zoku no Shuryō, lit. "Leader of the Acrobat Clan") is a character inSpeed Racer. He is the leader of theCar Acrobatic Teamand is Speed's arch-rival. His identity is revealed to beZile ZazicinSpeed Racer: The Next Generation. Captain Terror is shown in the manga as an arrogant racing car driver, sabotaging races for his own benefit. His arrogance gets the best of him, and he ends being humiliated when his team memberSnake Oilergot severely injured in an explosion, after not heeding Speed's warning about his car leaking oil in the dangerous Alpine Race. He wears a racing uniform with a "Z" embroidered on the chest. He has skeletal facial features and wears a helmet with a lone feather on the top. He drives the number 11 car, the only cosmetically different car compared to the of rest of the Car Acrobatic Team members' cars.

characters.name: Carl Potts
characters.description: Carl PottsReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleOccupationRacing driver (formerly)Cars drivenRebuilt WittiganPortrayed byUnknownCarl Pottsis a character in the background lore of theSpeed Racerfilm. He wears a helmet with a stripe on the middle and a racing suit with the number "00". Carl Potts was a racing driver forIodyne Industries. He raced in the 43rd Grand Prix, where he suffered an unfortunate DNF on the second lap. His car, a rebuilt Wittigan, spun out and caught on fire, as well as having caught on fire himself, the latter two of which as seen in a flashback sequence. It is retrospectively remarked byArnold Royaltonthat barely anybody remembers him.

characters.name: Chim Chim
characters.description: Chim ChimReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleRelativesSpritle Racer(owner; friend)Debut appearanceThe Great Plan (Part 1)(1967)Voiced byHiroshi Ohtake(Japanese)Jack Grimes(English) Chim-Chim(Japanese: サンぺイSanpei) is a pet chimpanzee and companion ofSpritle Racer. He got his name because he was considered a chimpanzee. Chim Chim and Spritle are an inseparable team and have a way of popping up at just the right time to pull Speed out of peril, so that he can go on to save the day. Most frequently they do this by sneaking inside theMach 5's trunk. The two often challenge and overcome muscle-bound thugs or gun-toting gangsters using slingshots, small rocks, and food as weapons. Of course, their efforts sometimes make matters worse. Packing as much slapstick punch as “The Three Stooges”, these two love candy so much that they fight between themselves over whatever bribes they manage to collect. Needless to say, they eat a ton of candy! Chim Chim often steals Spritle's food/candy when he isn't looking.

characters.name: Chim Chim
characters.description: Chim ChimReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleRelativesSpritle Racer(owner; friend)Debut appearanceThe Great Plan (Part 1)(1967)Voiced byHiroshi Ohtake(Japanese)Jack Grimes(English) Chim-Chim(Japanese: サンぺイSanpei) is a pet chimpanzee and companion ofSpritle Racer. He got his name because he was considered a chimpanzee. Chim Chim and Spritle are an inseparable team and have a way of popping up at just the right time to pull Speed out of peril, so that he can go on to save the day. Most frequently they do this by sneaking inside theMach 5's trunk. The two often challenge and overcome muscle-bound thugs or gun-toting gangsters using slingshots, small rocks, and food as weapons. Of course, their efforts sometimes make matters worse. Packing as much slapstick punch as “The Three Stooges”, these two love candy so much that they fight between themselves over whatever bribes they manage to collect. Needless to say, they eat a ton of candy! Chim Chim often steals Spritle's food/candy when he isn't looking.

characters.name: Chuckie Do
characters.description: Chuckie DoReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleOccupationRacerCars driven???Debut appearanceSpeed Racer (2008 film)Voiced byN/APortrayed by???Chuckie Do(チャッキー 道) is a background character from theSpeed Racerfilm. He wore a Musha Motors racing suit, a pair of glasses, and had a mustache. Do was a race car driver that did not physically appear in the movie, only being shown in the form of images. The first one was a poster seen inSpeed Racer's room when he was a kid, together with various other drivers. It had since been removed by the time he was an adult. The second was seen at the 91stGrand Prix, this time with his name written in Japanese.

characters.name: Conor
characters.description: ConorGenderMaleOccupationStudent at Racer AcademyRelativesUnnamed MotherDebut appearance"The Beginning: Part 1"Voiced byCarter Jackson Conoris the deuteragonist ofSpeed Racer: The Next Generation, and is the best friend ofSpeedandLucy. He is arguably the smartest technician in all ofRacer Academy. Conor is aSpeed Racer Sr.fanatic, owning all of his merchandise and dressing in his attire throughout the series. He is Speed’s roommate and quickly suspected that Speed was the descendant of Speed Racer Sr. Despite his genius, Conor is looked down upon by the other students at the academy due to his “nerdiness” and “creepy” nature. He is socially inept when trying to engage in regular conversations with others or even trying to get a date to the school dance (as seen in “The Dance”).

characters.name: Cruncher Block (2008 character)
characters.description: Cruncher Block (2008 character)Review·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderMaleOccupationRace-fixerGangsterRacing insider (falsely)Cars drivenSuperTruckDebut appearanceSpeed Racer (2008 film)Voiced byJohn BenfieldPortrayed byJohn BenfieldCruncher Blockis a supporting antagonist in the 2008Speed Racerfilm. He is portrayed by John Benfield. Cruncher Block is an insidious and unscrupulous individual who has no qualms about threatening, blackmailing, torturing, or even murdering people if they refuse to play along with the race-fixing cartel's whims. He is also somewhat of a caring pet owner, as he became alarmed when the aquarium tank containing his piranhas started leaking from a bullet hole sustained from a stray round.

characters.name: Delila
characters.description: DelilaReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderFemaleOccupationRacerCars drivenDelila Car(#87)ChiChi(game)Debut appearanceSpeed Racer (2008 film)Voiced byJana Pallaske (film)Julianne Buescher (game)Portrayed byJana Pallaske (film)Delilais a character in the 2008Speed Racerfilm and tie-invideogame. Delila has short red hair, wears glasses, a pink jacket, has a necklace with a skull, and black leather gloves with small brass eyelets. She also has a diamond piercing on her tongue. She's the leader of theFlying Foxes Freightteam, and is featured in theCasa Cristo Classic 5000. By the time of the movie, her team was quite new in the racing scene according to theSuperchargedfeaturette. Delila andher teammatewere two of the headhunters hired byCruncher Blockto eliminateTaejo Togokahnand his team.

characters.name: Denise Mobile
characters.description: Denise MobileReview·TropesShoutWiki · Miraheze · TelepediaBlogger · Wordpress · TumblrReddit · DeviantArt · ForumGenderFemaleOccupationRacerCars drivenIodyde(Pink)Debut appearanceSpeed Racer (2008 film)Voiced byTia Texada (game)Portrayed byLudmilla Ismailow (film)Denise Mobile(namedDenise Davisin the film) is a driver from the 2008Speed Racerfilmand also a playable character in the tie-invideo game. In the film, she's seen briefly in the locker rooms  with the other drivers participating theGrand Prix. Her car, theIodyde, is sponsored byIodyne Industries; and is one of theT-180swho attackSpeedduring the race. In the Videogame, she seems to care very much about her grandmother, as she constantly talks about her in the races. Her ally isMariana Zanjaand her rival isNitro Venderhoss.

characters.name: Elsa Zazic
characters.description: Elsa ZazicGenderFemaleRelativesZile Zazic(uncle)Zaza Zazic(aunt)Annalise Zazic(cousin)Cars drivenUber AutoDebut appearance"The Dance"Voiced by(needs research) Elsa Zazicis a character who appears inSpeed Racer: The Next Generation. She is the niece ofZile Zazicand isAnnalise's cousin. She appears in the episode "The Dance," where Zile enlisted her in a scheme to steal theMach 6. In return for her cooperation/success, she would be granted permanent residence in the United States again. Elsa is Annalise's cousin who was sent away toGermanyafter dragging down the Zazic name due to her numerous carjackings. The Zazic family tried to cover up her crimes, but it became an impossible task as she continued to steal other peoples' vehicles. Being sent away to Germany was a form of punishment by Zile to rid of Elsa's presence, thus, protecting the Zazic name from being tarnished.
